query: SELECT name, COUNT(*) as count FROM products GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aN4XovBvgLTwiy.root --database jWmfVYBaikHBYpPLbpiijG --execute SELECT name, COUNT(*) as count FROM products GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
